# Glossary Item Entry Request Template
```
Open a PR that applies the skill inside 
`.github/skills/skill-add-glossary-items.md` 
to add glossary item entries to `source/aa-bookends/glossary.ptx`
for the following sections:



Notes:

* Review the current glossary items and match their style and format 
  as closely as possible.
* Each item should be concise and to the point, but important 
  mathematical statements should be displayed rather than inlined.
* Do not attempt to build the pretext document in testing. 
  There is no way around some of the firewall errors you will receive.
```
